query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, m.id as media_id, m.filename, m.latitude, m.longitude, m.altitude
FROM projects p
JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN media m ON p.id = m.projectId
WHERE u.email = 'claybechtol@gmail.com'
  AND (m.latitude IS NOT NULL AND m.longitude IS NOT NULL OR m.id IS NULL)
ORDER BY p.id, m.id
LIMIT 20;
